isolation.notes: Next.js dev server on port 3000, cart is client-side per session, all data hardcoded

assertions.title: Shop listing page renders with product grid

steps.expected: Shop page loads with product grid
steps.observed: Shop page loads with 'Shop All' heading, category filters (All, Seasonings, Juices, Bundles), sort dropdown, and 6 products displayed
Products displayed in 3-column grid (1280px viewport). CSS confirms grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3

steps.expected: Cards show image (3:4 ratio), name, price, and rating
steps.observed: Each card shows product image in 3:4 aspect ratio on light gray background, uppercase product name, subtitle, star rating with review count, and price

steps.action: Verify mobile responsiveness via CSS review
steps.expected: Grid collapses to 1 column on mobile
steps.observed: CSS uses grid-cols-1 (mobile), sm:grid-cols-2 (tablet), lg:grid-cols-3 (desktop) — confirmed responsive

assertions.title: Product card hover shows image swap

steps.observed: Green Vitality Juice shows primary image (green juice glass with fruits)

Image smoothly transitions (opacity fade, 500ms) to secondary image (jar/bottle image). Component uses onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave with React state to toggle opacity between primary and secondary images

steps.expected: Secondary image exists and swaps on hover
steps.observed: ProductCard.tsx confirms: isHovered state toggles opacity-0/opacity-100 on primary and secondary images with 500ms transition and cubic-bezier easing

steps.action: Click on Green Vitality Juice product card
steps.observed: PDP loads successfully with full product details
Large main image displayed with 2 thumbnail buttons below ('View image 1 of 2', 'View image 2 of 2')

steps.expected: Product name, subtitle, star rating visible
steps.observed: 'GREEN VITALITY JUICE' title, 'Cold-pressed daily greens' subtitle, 5-star rating with '89 reviews' link

steps.expected: Subscribe & Save and One-Time Purchase options with prices
steps.observed: Subscribe & Save 15% ($10.20) and One-Time Purchase ($12.00) toggle options displayed
Black 'ADD TO CART' button displayed with quantity controls (decrease/increase)
Three accordion sections: Benefits, How to Use, Ingredients — all collapsed by default

steps.action: Verify mobile responsiveness via CSS review
steps.observed: PDPContent.tsx uses grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 — confirmed responsive stacking

steps.expected: All accordion sections collapsed with down chevrons
steps.observed: Benefits, How to Use, Ingredients all collapsed with down chevron icons
Benefits section expanded smoothly, header text turned terracotta color with up chevron, content displayed: '100% cold-pressed. Rich in vitamins A, C, and K. Supports immune function and digestion.'
Benefits section collapsed, returning to original state

assertions.title: Add to cart updates cart count

steps.observed: Cart button labeled 'Open cart, 0 items'

steps.expected: Cart count updates and cart slide-in opens
steps.observed: Cart button updated to 'Open cart, 1 items', cart slide-in panel opened from right side with backdrop blur

steps.expected: Cart shows added product with details
steps.observed: Cart panel shows 'YOUR CART (1)', Green Vitality Juice with image, $12.00 price, quantity controls, remove button, SUBTOTAL: $12.00, VIEW CART and CHECKOUT buttons

steps.action: Navigate to /shop and view product cards
steps.expected: Product badges visible on applicable products
steps.observed: Badges displayed on product cards: 'BEST SELLER' on Green Vitality Juice, 'BEST SELLER' on Soul Seasoning Blend, 'BUNDLE & SAVE' on The Wellness Bundle, 'COMING SOON' on Adaptogen Energy Bites
Badges use bg-primary (terracotta #C65D3E) with white text, uppercase 10px font, 0.08em letter-spacing — confirmed via Badge.tsx component
Badges positioned at top-left of product card images (absolute top-3 left-3)

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. All shop page features working correctly — product grid layout, hover image swap, PDP with gallery/accordions/subscribe toggle, add to cart with slide-in panel, and product badges.
